summary.intent: Build and style a full Electron/React/Mantine UI for the 'gossamer' app, including a sessions table with rich interactions, dark/light mode support, and a chat-transcript-style session detail view.
summary.outcome: Mantine was fully integrated with a GitHub-inspired theme; all screens and components were migrated from React Native primitives; dark mode was fixed across all screens; the sessions table got copy-to-clipboard, activity indicators, and row-click navigation; the session detail page was redesigned as a chat transcript with user/Claude bubbles and tool activity blocks.

repo: Project is at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer — Electron app in app/, server in src/, Prisma schema in prisma/schema.prisma
Renderer source is at app/src/renderer/src/ with screens/ and components/ subdirectories
Server exposes /api/v2/sessions/:id/checkpoints for fetching per-session checkpoints
CheckpointSessionMetadata.createdAt (nullable DateTime) is the source for Checkpoint.createdAt in API responses
Activity status thresholds: <2min=green (active), <15min=orange (idle), else gray (inactive) — defined in SessionTree and replicated in SessionRow
Mantine PostCSS config must be postcss.config.cjs (CommonJS) not ESM for electron-vite compatibility
Breadcrumb state is managed via React context (BreadcrumbContext.tsx) with crumbs set per-page via useEffect

code.finding: CopyCell component wraps Table.Td with hover-triggered absolute ActionIcon for clipboard copy; activityDot() returns {color, label} based on updatedAt thresholds
AppShell.Header must span full viewport to keep hamburger visible when navbar is collapsed — placing toggle in AppShell.Main causes it to be hidden when sidebar closes
GitHub-inspired dark palette: dark[0..9] = #e6edf3 → #000000; localStorageColorSchemeManager with key 'gossamer-color-scheme'; defaultColorScheme='dark'
All inline and fenced code block backgrounds were hardcoded light colors — needed light-dark() replacements throughout
Chat transcript layout: user messages right-aligned bubble (indigo bg, 14px 14px 2px 14px corners), Claude messages left-aligned with orange 'C' avatar (2px 14px 14px 14px corners)
Tool activity blocks indented 58px left to align under Claude's avatar column

workflow: Use light-dark(lightValue, darkValue) CSS function for all theme-aware colors — Mantine's X-0 color variants (e.g. teal-0, gray-0) are always light and do not adapt to dark mode
Mantine's var(--mantine-color-dark-N) variables are also static — only light-dark() switches correctly with color scheme toggles
electron-vite build is a reliable way to catch TypeScript/import errors before running the app
React context is the clean pattern for passing UI state (breadcrumbs) from child screens up to the Layout shell

friction: Mantine's color variables (var(--mantine-color-X-0)) do not adapt to dark mode — every hardcoded color required manual audit and replacement with light-dark()
AppShell hamburger button placement was non-obvious — it needed to be in AppShell.Header (full-width) not AppShell.Main (which shifts with sidebar)
Multiple files (SessionDetail, EventItem, ToolGroupItem, ToolUseItem, CheckpointMessageItem, MarkdownView) all had hardcoded light colors requiring iterative fixes across separate user reports
Checkpoint column feature was started (adding most recent checkpoint ID to sessions table) then interrupted and replaced with a different approach (dropdown), then later removed entirely
open_items: CheckpointDetail.tsx still uses var(--mantine-color-teal-0) and var(--mantine-color-gray-0) — may not respect dark mode
CheckpointMessageItem.tsx still uses var(--mantine-color-indigo-0), #fff, orange border — likely has same dark mode issue
CheckpointTimeline.tsx was rewritten but not audited for dark mode color issues
Breadcrumb on sessions list uses first session's user/repo — if sessions span multiple users/repos this may be misleading
MarkdownView syntax highlighting (if any) may still have hardcoded theme colors not covered by the light-dark() fixes
